name: Kerfur-Omega
description:
Often mistakenly called Kerfuś. This one's better.

So you made a Kerfur-Omega after finding a strange blueprint in the bunker near your lab. Now you have your own cat-boy robot to do anything you please with it! It also exceeds at fixing transformers, servers and making grilled cheese.

Your task is to gather signals from space, analyze them, process them and sell them to get points and cash, if you don't know why you're in the mountains.

You also have a tablet with most common options because in the game you have a menu, though, you can really order anything.

Caution: I know that this is very unlikely, but if you pat it at the speeds of 10 pats a second for 28 seconds straight, it will meowerload and explode. I apologise sincerely for the pun, but I'm keeping it.

I had an urge to make a Kerfur-Omega bot for a while now, so I'll quickly drop it and continue with my series, I swear.

Also, why do people keep calling it Kerfuś? Wikipedia says it's a Kerfur. This guy doesn't work in a shop, he works in a Swedish lab in the mountains.

Update: Played VotV, my laptop barely could run it, enjoyed the experience. How do you get rid of the trash? Like, the one that's like ground but when you pick it up it forms into a ball?

Upon testing it out I came to a conclusion: fuck it, now it has a mouth, since the bot's behaviour needs one to make sense.

Update2: Who wants a less human and more cat-like silly kerfur sometime in the late future? Returned the pfp. Just cropped.
creator: GameCrusher777
